scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @novel-engine/core && npm run build -w @novel-engine/hub && npm run build -w @novel-engine/maze-rpg && npm run build -w @novel-engine/runner-action && npm run build -w @novel-engine/memory-game && npm run build -w @novel-engine/flash-calc && npm run build -w @novel-engine/spot-difference && npm run build -w @novel-engine/timing-game && npm run build -w @novel-engine/code-lab
